overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a dark coat exploring a rocky canyon at night. The character approaches a small stone hut with a lit lantern, enters to briefly explore the interior, then exits and continues toward a large waterfall cascading down the cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path with distant waterfall

events.description: night sky becomes visible between the cliff walls above the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rocky canyon toward the misty waterfall in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
tall cascading waterfall with mist rising from the base
small stone building with lit doorway and sloped roof
low wooden fence along the path near the hut

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon at night, with tall cliff walls on both sides. A misty waterfall cascades in the distance ahead, while a small stone hut with a warm lantern glow sits to the right. Sparse grass patches dot the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone hut entrance in canyon

events.description: character enters the stone hut through the wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone hut and stepping through the illuminated doorway

entered.detail: open doorway with wooden frame leading into the hut
warm glowing lantern mounted beside the hut entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the stone hut, passing the wooden fence. The lantern beside the door casts a warm glow on the rocky ground. The character moves toward and enters the open doorway, transitioning from the outdoor canyon to the interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: small stone hut interior with wooden door

events.description: character turns to examine the wooden door inside the hut

agents.ego_description: exploring the dimly lit interior, examining the stone walls and wooden door

entered.detail: rough stone block walls inside the hut
closed wooden door with metal hinges at the back of the hut
horizontal wooden support beams across the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Inside the small stone hut, the space is enclosed by rough stone walls and dimly lit by the lantern. The character explores the interior, looking at a closed wooden door at the back of the room. Wooden beams support the ceiling, and the floor is made of uneven stone.

events.description: character exits the stone hut back into the canyon
character pauses to look up at the full height of the waterfall

agents.ego_description: exiting the hut and continuing toward the waterfall, looking up at the cascading water

entered.detail: open canyon path leading toward the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the stone hut back into the night canyon, leaving the warm lantern light behind. The path continues toward the misty waterfall, which dominates the view ahead between the tall cliff walls. The character looks up at the full height of the cascading water as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, rocky canyon that leads into a sheltered stone interior before returning to the open night air. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path between towering cliff walls, moving toward a distant misty waterfall while passing a small stone hut illuminated by a warm lantern. As the character approaches the wooden fence, the camera follows them through the open doorway, transitioning from the cool canyon night into a dimly lit room of rough stone walls and wooden ceiling beams. The scene then shifts as the character exits the hut, leaving the golden glow behind to return to the narrow canyon path. Finally, the camera moves forward toward the cascading waterfall, tilting upward to reveal the full height of the water falling between the cliffs.
